executive_summary: This report identifies strengths in maintaining an alert room presence and distributing engagement. Opportunities for growth include refining gesture size, softening facial tone, and ensuring a more open stance and audience-facing orientation after checks. The feedback is based on limited evidence, so observations are presented as watch items.
no_material_intervention_needed_reason: Evidence quality is too limited to justify corrective feedback in this clip.
keep_doing: Keep the same quick room checks that make the lecture feel attentive.
Reuse the left-center-right room sweep that already looks natural.
